visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black Kangol beret and a white lace-textured dress, stands in a brightly lit Costco freezer section. She holds a rectangular green and white box of 'Authentic Asia Shrimp Wonton Tom Yum Soup' with both hands, presenting it to the camera while smiling and speaking with expressive facial movements. (2) The setting shifts to a home interior with warm lighting. The woman from before, now wearing a black and white patterned bucket hat, sits beside a friend with a black headband. They are positioned behind several stacked black plastic soup bowls and the product box, gesturing enthusiastically while discussing the item. (3) The camera provides a series of tight close-up shots of the product's physical details. This includes a top-down view of six sealed black plastic cups in the box and a close-up of the cardboard packaging's back panel, which displays white text against a green background explaining preparation steps. (4) A close-up shot captures the interior of a black plastic bowl containing a frozen, brownish-orange puck of soup base with pale wontons embedded inside. The following shot shows the hot, prepared soup; a white spoon lifts a large, translucent shrimp wonton out of the steaming orange-red broth. (5) The two women engage in a tasting session. One takes a spoonful of soup and a wonton, reacting with a wide-eyed expression of delight and a thumbs-up. The other woman smiles and gestures towards the food. Colorful, large text overlays in yellow and blue animate onto the screen frequently throughout the scene.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 妹妹煮給我吃. [Variety]: 最新出的這是什麼?. (2) [Variety]: 微波3分就能吃. [Variety]: 冷凍 鮮蝦雲吞冬蔭功. (3) [Subtitle]: 鮮蝦雲吞 冬蔭功湯. [Variety]: 449元. (4) [Subtitle]: 裡面是6小碗. [Subtitle]: 那它只要微波 加熱3分鐘就可以吃. [Subtitle]: 記得要加水喔. (5) [Subtitle]: 對 那它這個雲吞呢 裡面有5顆 每一顆是15塊錢 一碗是75元 價格小高. [Variety]: 非常泰 非常入味. (6) [Variety]: Q彈. [Variety]: 薄薄透透. [Variety]: 很好入口. [Variety]: 好吃過癮.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing throughout the video
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wears a black beret/bucket hat and a white lace dress. The second woman wears a black headband and a dark top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts in a warehouse supermarket freezer aisle with glass doors and price tags; moves to an indoor home living room with a shelf of plush toys and a light-colored wall.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic female voice opens the video with rapid speech, exhibiting a friendly and excited tone. The background features a high-fidelity, upbeat electronic pop track with a steady rhythmic pulse around 125-130 BPM, characterized by bright synthesizer chords and a clean bassline. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' SFX transition marks a change in setting, accompanied by a digital 'ding' sound. The primary female voice continues with high arousal, detailing the product price. The BGM remains at a consistent volume, providing a vibrant, commercial-style acoustic backdrop without any audible ambient noise. (3) A new audio phase is triggered by a subtle percussive 'clack' of a plastic container and a slight shift in the speaker's vocal resonance as they transition to an informative narrative style. She details the quantity of portions, her voice maintaining clear articulation and a rising intonation pattern at phrase endings. (4) A distinct 'slurping' sound followed by a soft 'crunch' of eating is clearly audible over the music. This is immediately followed by two female voices laughing and saying 'wow' with high vocal intensity. The BGM continues its steady loop, reinforcing the positive emotional valence of the tasting test. (5) The speaker concludes with a final energetic vocal phrase delivered with strong projection and confidence. A celebratory 'pop' sound effect is heard as the segment concludes. The music maintains its high-energy texture until a quick fade-out occurs at the very end of the recording.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product Introduction -> Price and Packaging Detail -> Preparation Steps -> Texture and Taste Review -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to review and promote a frozen shrimp wonton tom yum soup product sold at Costco. It combines high-energy presentation with detailed cost-per-unit breakdowns and sensory tasting reactions to influence viewers' purchasing decisions.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the product packaging, mentioning the purchase location (Costco), and detailed price review.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly energetic food review utilizing standard social media editing tropes, including variety-show captions and upbeat BGM.
